description: A student calls to make a noise complaint about a loud party in another room on their floor during quiet hours.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student making the complaint and the location of the noise.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gathers the necessary details while maintaining the caller's anonymity.

nodes.task_description: Contact the RA on duty for the building to investigate the complaint.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully reaches the RA and relays the information.

nodes.task_description: Log the complaint in the residential life incident tracking system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a formal record of the complaint.
